title: AIIMS Delhi – Project Research Scientist / Programmer – 3 Posts
shortInfo: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist/ Programmer Recruitment 2026 is now open for 3 Project Research Scientist II (Medical), Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical) and Programmer posts for candidates with MBBS, BVSc, BDS, Post Graduate Degree, PhD, MCA, IT/CS Degree or B.E./B.Tech qualifications as per post, with online applications open till 31-05-2026 through the official website aiims.edu.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist / Programmer Posts
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist/ Programmer Recruitment 2026 is now open for 3 Project Research Scientist II (Medical), Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical) and Programmer posts for candidates with MBBS, BVSc, BDS, Post Graduate Degree, PhD, MCA, IT/CS Degree or B.E./B.Tech qualifications as per post, with online applications open till 31-05-2026 through the official website aiims.edu.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS / BVSc / BDS with three years' post qualification experience or Post Graduate Degree or PhD, Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degrees or Four Years Graduate Degree for Engineering/IT/CS, Master's degree in Computer Application / Information Technology / Computer Science or B.E./B.Tech in Computer Engineering / Computer Science / Computer Technology / Information Technology

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
